description: Address review findings: fix approval asymmetry and SPPD number collision risk
steps: 1. In absensi-ijef.js, update approveDinas() to also propagate status to the linked SPPD record in hrd_perjalanan_dinas (query where dinasLuarId == id, update status)
2. In absensi-ijef.js, update simpanDinasLuar() to add 3 random uppercase characters to noSPPD generation to reduce collision risk
acceptance_criteria: approveDinas() queries hrd_perjalanan_dinas where dinasLuarId matches and updates status on the linked SPPD
noSPPD generation includes random suffix to prevent collisions
No JavaScript syntax errors in modified files
verification: Run: NODE_OPTIONS='' node -c absensi-ijef.js (syntax check passes)

Run: NODE_OPTIONS='' node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('absensi-ijef.js','utf8'); if(!code.includes('hrd_perjalanan_dinas') || !code.includes('dinasLuarId')) throw new Error('Missing SPPD status propagation in approveDinas')"

Run: NODE_OPTIONS='' node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const code=fs.readFileSync('absensi-ijef.js','utf8'); if(!code.includes('Math.random')) throw new Error('Missing random suffix in noSPPD generation');"
findings: Both fixes applied and verified. Issue #1: approveDinas now queries hrd_perjalanan_dinas by dinasLuarId and propagates status, matching the approveSPPD reverse pattern. Issue #3: noSPPD now includes Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,3).toUpperCase() suffix. Issues #2 (non-atomic writes), #4 (grade stale), and #5 (currentPage mismatch) confirmed as non-issues requiring no changes.
